name: avatar-builder
title: Avatar Builder
description: Production-ready Humation avatar builder UI: responsive preview, part picker, color sheet, randomize, PNG/SVG export, and JSON state copy. Built on shadcn/ui.
docs: Use this block as the starting point for Humation avatar creation UI. Do not recreate a simplified picker from scratch. The block already includes responsive layout, selection state without layout shift, color controls, randomize, PNG/SVG export states, and local Humation package rendering with no API calls.
